case_title: SHEARS, JACK DBA SHEARS & WINDOW VS ALEXANDER, PETER MR. DBA ALEXANDER BAUGHAN DBA PE- et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,025.50 FILED BY SHEARS, JACK DBA SHEARS & WINDOW AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, PETER MR. DBA ALEXANDER BAUGHAN DBA PE- DBA PETER ALEXANDER INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO PETER ALEXANDER DBA ALEXANDER BAUGHAN RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEARS, JACK DBA SHEARS & WINDOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, PETER MR. DBA ALEXANDER BAUGHAN DBA PE- DBA PETER ALEXANDER INC. $3,025.50 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,045.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, PETER MR. DBA ALEXANDER BAUGHAN DBA PE- DBA PETER ALEXANDER INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, PETER MR. DBA ALEXANDER BAUGHAN DBA PE- DBA PETER ALEXANDER INC.
